title: Blazing Glory [Guns]
description: This mod adds guns, 'nades, curios-like equipment system and a few blocks.
body:
A mod that adds 5(+1 derivative) firearms with unique, step-by-step reloads.

This mod also contains a few other items, such as a manual on how to use said firearms, a grenade, containers for ammunition and ammunition itself. It also adds curios-like equipment system.

Having JEI installed is HEAVILY advised.

\/ Old Trailer, will replace whenever i finish 1.1.0 one. \/
